ops.text: Phase 4 VERIFICATION COMPLETE — two-provider zero-config model proven end-to-end live. Installed state: captain-hook 11.0.0 dispatching (user scope), cc-context 0.29.0 / getaway 1.1.0 / cc-notes 0.13.0(user) cached with NEW capt-hook/ layout (marketplace autoUpdate pulled them). Real dispatch smokes (uvx --isolated 'capt-hook>=11.0.0' run PreToolUse, zero consumer config): (A) plugin pack fires — `git diff` → allow+updatedInput rewriting to the 0.29.0 cache's bin/ccx `ccx vcs diff` + steering context; (B) builtin fires — `rm -rf /` → DENY (rm-safety, the exact deletions.py guard fixed tonight). Fleet smoke ×4 repo shapes, all zero-config✓ + rm-root=deny + correct rosters: getaway {5 builtins incl python from cli/pyproject.toml, NO go} +6 plugins; cc-guides {go from go.mod, no python}; authkit {neither — TS; p:cc-present present = enablement rider worked}; cc-context {both go+python}. Auto-detection precise per build-manifest, all 6 moved plugin packs load everywhere. RELEASES: captain-hook v11.0.0 (PyPI) + all plugin version bumps shipped and cache-confirmed live; NO ccx CLI v-tag needed (migration changed plugin layout only, no CLI code). MIGRATION SUBSTANTIVELY COMPLETE. Tail (non-blocking): fleet CI green-confirmations deferred behind the ~100min GitHub Actions partial outage (Git Operations up, all pushes landed; recovery monitor byfe18omu sweeps when Actions returns); cc-vigil pre-existing SPM-pin red = owner decision (task 11); cmd.py backslash-newline move (task 17, deferred); cc-skills guides README edits left in shared @ for concurrent gitignore session to carry (task 18, verify landed).
